title: BLT: Browser-based Lightweight Toolkit for Editing Field Data
description: BLT is a single-file, fully client-side browser tool for field-linguistic transcription, annotation, interlinear glossing, and format conversion. It reads raw WAV audio, auto-segments it by silence detection, supports waveform-based boundary editing, IPA input, customizable annotation tiers, speaker overlap, and import/export of ELAN EAF, TSV, and JSON. No external libraries or server are required.
